title: Emma's Sleepy Stars
synopsis: Little Emma gets ready for bed with help from her loving family, watching the magical stars appear in the night sky as she drifts off to sleep in this gentle bedtime story.

pages.text: Emma yawns. It's bedtime! Mama helps Emma put on soft pajamas. The moon is rising high.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks wearing soft purple pajamas, standing next to her mama in a cozy bedroom with soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars visible through the window, gentle moonlight streaming in, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma getting ready for bed with her mama as moonlight shines through the window

pages.text: Papa reads a story. Emma snuggles close. The stars begin to twinkle outside her window.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks cuddling with papa in a big chair, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars twinkling outside, floating clouds in the night sky, gentle moonlight, round sleepy faces, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma and papa reading together as stars twinkle outside

pages.text: Emma climbs into her cozy bed. Mama kisses her forehead. Papa tucks her in tight. Sweet dreams, Emma!

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks lying peacefully in bed with mama and papa nearby, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars filling the sky outside, floating clouds, gentle moonlight bathing the room, round sleepy faces, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma tucked into bed with loving parents as magical stars shine outside

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: What does Mama help Emma put on?
questions.explanation: Mama helps Emma put on soft pajamas to get ready for bed.

questions.question: What does Papa do with Emma?
questions.explanation: Papa reads Emma a bedtime story while she snuggles close.

questions.question: What twinkles outside Emma's window?
questions.explanation: The stars begin to twinkle outside Emma's window as bedtime approaches.
